message.content:
Explore the current state of Storybook configuration and any existing stories in this React Native MFE project. I need to understand:

1. What stories already exist? Check `src/__stories__/` and any `*.stories.*` files
2. What's the current Storybook config? Check `.storybook/main.ts`, `.storybook/preview.*`
3. What mocks exist in `.storybook/mocks/`?
4. What DS components are available? Check `node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app` - specifically look for exports of: Text, Button, Box, InputBox, Alert, Icon, ListTextIcon, SeparatorHorizontal, BackDropBottom, Loading
5. Check if there's a `.storybook/playwright-screenshots.mjs` and what it does
6. Check `package.json` for storybook-related scripts

Give me file contents and paths for everything you find.

content.text: I'll explore the Storybook configuration and stories in this project systematically.

content.text: Now let me read the Storybook configuration files and the existing stories:

content.content:
1→import type { StorybookConfig } from '@storybook/react-native-web-vite';
     2→import type { PluginOption } from 'vite';
     3→import { transformWithEsbuild } from 'vite';
     4→import path from 'path';
     5→
     6→const JSX_JS_PACKAGES = [
     7→  'react-native-flip-card',
     8→  '@semparar/design-system-app',
     9→];
    10→
    11→function jsxInJsPlugin(): PluginOption {
    12→  return {
    13→    name: 'storybook:jsx-in-js',
    14→    enforce: 'pre',
    15→    async transform(code, id) {
    16→      const cleanId = id.replace(/\?.*$/, '');
    17→      if (
    18→        /\.js$/.test(cleanId) &&
    19→        JSX_JS_PACKAGES.some(pkg => id.includes(pkg)) &&
    20→        (code.includes('<') || code.includes('/>'))
    21→      ) {
    22→        return transformWithEsbuild(code, id, {
    23→          loader: 'jsx',
    24→          jsx: 'automatic',
    25→        });
    26→      }
    27→    },
    28→  };
    29→}
    30→
    31→const config: StorybookConfig = {
    32→  stories: ['../src/**/*.stories.@(ts|tsx)'],
    33→
    34→  framework: {
    35→    name: '@storybook/react-native-web-vite',
    36→    options: {
    37→      modulesToTranspile: [
    38→        'react-native',
    39→        'react-native-reanimated',
    40→        'react-native-safe-area-context',
    41→        'react-native-gesture-handler',
    42→        'react-native-icomoon',
    43→        'react-native-flip-card',
    44→        'react-native-linear-gradient',
    45→        'react-native-status-bar-height',
    46→        'react-native-svg',
    47→        'react-native-svg-charts',
    48→        '@semparar/design-system-app',
    49→      ],
    50→    },
    51→  },
    52→
    53→  addons: ['@storybook/addon-essentials'],
    54→
    55→  viteFinal: async config => {
    56→    config.plugins = config.plugins || [];
    57→    config.plugins.push(jsxInJsPlugin());
    58→
    59→    config.optimizeDeps = config.optimizeDeps || {};
    60→    config.optimizeDeps.include = [
    61→      ...(config.optimizeDeps.include || []),
    62→      'styled-components',
    63→      'styled-components/native',
    64→    ];
    65→
    66→    config.resolve = config.resolve || {};
    67→    config.resolve.alias = {
    68→      ...(config.resolve.alias || {}),
    69→      '~': path.resolve(__dirname, '../src'),
    70→      '~/store': path.resolve(__dirname, 'mocks/store.ts'),
    71→      'postcss': path.resolve(__dirname, '../node_modules/postcss/lib/postcss.mjs'),
    72→      'react-native-linear-gradient': path.resolve(
    73→        __dirname,
    74→        'mocks/react-native-linear-gradient.tsx',
    75→      ),
    76→      'react-native-modalize': path.resolve(
    77→        __dirname,
    78→        'mocks/react-native-modalize.tsx',
    79→      ),
    80→      'react-native-skeleton-placeholder': path.resolve(
    81→        __dirname,
    82→        'mocks/react-native-skeleton-placeholder.tsx',
    83→      ),
    84→      '@react-native-community/slider': path.resolve(
    85→        __dirname,
    86→        'mocks/react-native-community-slider.tsx',
    87→      ),
    88→      'lottie-react-native': path.resolve(
    89→        __dirname,
    90→        'mocks/lottie-react-native.tsx',
    91→      ),
    92→      'react-native-video': path.resolve(
    93→        __dirname,
    94→        'mocks/react-native-video.tsx',
    95→      ),
    96→    };
    97→    return config;
    98→  },
    99→};
   100→
   101→export default config;
   102→

content.text: Now let me read the existing stories:

content.content:
1→import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { View, ScrollView } from 'react-native';
     3→import {
     4→  Text,
     5→  Button,
     6→  Box,
     7→  InputBox,
     8→  Alert,
     9→  Icon,
    10→  ListTextIcon,
    11→  SeparatorHorizontal,
    12→  BackDropBottom,
    13→  Loading,
    14→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    15→import type { Meta, StoryObj } from 'storybook/internal/types';
    16→
    17→function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: 'ok' | 'fail' | 'warn' }) {
    18→  const colors = { ok: '#22c55e', fail: '#ef4444', warn: '#f59e0b' };
    19→  const labels = { ok: 'RENDERS', fail: 'FAILS', warn: 'PARTIAL' };
    20→  return (
    21→    <View
    22→      style={{
    23→        backgroundColor: colors[status],
    24→        paddingHorizontal: 8,
    25→        paddingVertical: 2,
    26→        borderRadius: 4,
    27→        alignSelf: 'flex-start',
    28→        marginBottom: 8,
    29→      }}
    30→    >
    31→      <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_01">
    32→        {labels[status]}
    33→      </Text>
    34→    </View>
    35→  );
    36→}
    37→
    38→function Section({
    39→  title,
    40→  children,
    41→}: {
    42→  title: string;
    43→  children: React.ReactNode;
    44→}) {
    45→  return (
    46→    <View style={{ marginBottom: 32 }}>
    47→      <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller">
    48→        {title}
    49→      </Text>
    50→      <Box
    51→        pd="squishSmall"
    52→        bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02"
    53→        br="sm"
    54→        bw="thin"
    55→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    56→      >
    57→        {children}
    58→      </Box>
    59→    </View>
    60→  );
    61→}
    62→
    63→function TextValidation() {
    64→  return (
    65→    <Section title="1. Text">
    66→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
    67→      <Text type="headingMDL" mb="nano">
    68→        headingMDL — Form titles
    69→      </Text>
    70→      <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="nano">
    71→        subtitleXXL — Section headings
    72→      </Text>
    73→      <Text type="bodyMD" mb="nano">
    74→        bodyMD — Body text
    75→      </Text>
    76→      <Text type="paragraphMD" mb="nano">
    77→        paragraphMD — Descriptions
    78→      </Text>
    79→      <Text type="bodySM" mb="nano" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    80→        bodySM + color — Secondary text
    81→      </Text>
    82→      <Text
    83→        type="bodyMD"
    84→        color="PRYMARY_BASE_02"
    85→        underline
    86→        onPress={() => {}}
    87→      >
    88→        Pressable + underline — Link style
    89→      </Text>
    90→    </Section>
    91→  );
    92→}
    93→
    94→function ButtonValidation() {
    95→  return (
    96→    <Section title="2. Button">
    97→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
    98→      <Button text="Primary Large (default)" onPress={() => {}} mb="nano" />
    99→      <Button
   100→        text="Disabled State"
   101→        onPress={() => {}}
   102→        disabled
   103→        mb="nano"
   104→      />
   105→      <Button
   106→        text="With Icon"
   107→        onPress={() => {}}
   108→        icon="icon-check"
   109→        mb="nano"
   110→      />
   111→      <Button
   112→        text="Loading State"
   113→        onPress={() => {}}
   114→        isLoading
   115→      />
   116→    </Section>
   117→  );
   118→}
   119→
   120→function BoxValidation() {
   121→  return (
   122→    <Section title="3. Box">
   123→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   124→      <Box
   125→        pd="squishSmall"
   126→        bgColor="PRYMARY_BASE_01"
   127→        br="md"
   128→        mb="nano"
   129→      >
   130→        <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_01">
   131→          Box with bgColor, padding, borderRadius
   132→        </Text>
   133→      </Box>
   134→      <Box direction align="center" mb="nano">
   135→        <Box
   136→          pd="squishSmall"
   137→          bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02"
   138→          br="sm"
   139→          mr="nano"
   140→          flex={1}
   141→        >
   142→          <Text type="bodySM">Row item 1</Text>
   143→        </Box>
   144→        <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm" flex={1}>
   145→          <Text type="bodySM">Row item 2</Text>
   146→        </Box>
   147→      </Box>
   148→      <Box
   149→        pd="innerMedium"
   150→        bw="thin"
   151→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   152→        br="sm"
   153→      >
   154→        <Text type="bodySM">Box with border</Text>
   155→      </Box>
   156→    </Section>
   157→  );
   158→}
   159→
   160→function InputBoxValidation() {
   161→  const [value1, setValue1] = useState('');
   162→  const [value2, setValue2] = useState('');
   163→  const [value3, setValue3] = useState('');
   164→
   165→  return (
   166→    <Section title="4. InputBox">
   167→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   168→      <InputBox
   169→        label="Valor em pontos"
   170→        placeholder="0"
   171→        showLabel
   172→        keyboardType="number-pad"
   173→        value={value1}
   174→        onChangeText={setValue1}
   175→        mb="nano"
   176→      />
   177→      <InputBox
   178→        label="Valor em reais"
   179→        placeholder="R$ 0,00"
   180→        showLabel
   181→        keyboardType="decimal-pad"
   182→        value={value2}
   183→        onChangeText={setValue2}
   184→        textRight="Usar todos"
   185→        onPressTextRight={() => setValue2('100')}
   186→        mb="nano"
   187→      />
   188→      <InputBox
   189→        label="With error"
   190→        placeholder="Type something"
   191→        showLabel
   192→        value={value3}
   193→        onChangeText={setValue3}
   194→        error
   195→        textError="Valor excede o saldo disponível"
   196→      />
   197→    </Section>
   198→  );
   199→}
   200→
   201→function AlertValidation() {
   202→  return (
   203→    <Section title="5. Alert">
   204→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   205→      <Alert
   206→        label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
   207→        type="highlight"
   208→        icon="icon-calendar"
   209→        mb="nano"
   210→      />
   211→      <Alert
   212→        label="Resgate realizado com sucesso!"
   213→        type="success"
   214→        icon="icon-check"
   215→        mb="nano"
   216→      />
   217→      <Alert
   218→        label="Erro ao processar sua solicitação."
   219→        type="error"
   220→        icon="icon-help"
   221→        mb="nano"
   222→      />
   223→      <Alert
   224→        label="Atenção: valor mínimo de 100 pontos."
   225→        type="alert"
   226→        icon="icon-help"
   227→      />
   228→    </Section>
   229→  );
   230→}
   231→
   232→function IconValidation() {
   233→  return (
   234→    <Section title="6. Icon">
   235→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   236→      <Box direction align="center" mb="nano">
   237→        <Icon name="icon-check" size="md" color="PRYMARY_BASE_02" mr="nano" />
   238→        <Icon
   239→          name="icon-calendar"
   240→          size="md"
   241→          color="BRAND_BASE_01"
   242→          mr="nano"
   243→        />
   244→        <Icon name="icon-help" size="md" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05" mr="nano" />
   245→        <Icon
   246→          name="icon-switch-vertical"
   247→          size="md"
   248→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
   249→        />
   250→      </Box>
   251→      <Box direction align="center">
   252→        <Icon
   253→          name="icon-check"
   254→          size="sm"
   255→          color="BRAND_BASE_01"
   256→          hasBackground
   257→          backgroundType="circle"
   258→          bgColorCircle="INTENSE_COLOR_01"
   259→          hasBackgroundCircle
   260→          mr="nano"
   261→        />
   262→        <Text type="bodySM">Icon with circle background</Text>
   263→      </Box>
   264→    </Section>
   265→  );
   266→}
   267→
   268→function ListTextIconValidation() {
   269→  return (
   270→    <Section title="7. ListTextIcon">
   271→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   272→      <ListTextIcon
   273→        items={[
   274→          {
   275→            icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
   276→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   277→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   278→            description: 'Cada 100 pontos valem R$ 1,00 no voucher',
   279→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   280→          },
   281→          {
   282→            icon: 'icon-calendar',
   283→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   284→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   285→            description: 'Você define quanto desconto quer no abastecimento',
   286→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   287→          },
   288→          {
   289→            icon: 'icon-check',
   290→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   291→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   292→            description: 'Após o resgate, o voucher fica disponível no app',
   293→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   294→          },
   295→        ]}
   296→        type="list"
   297→      />
   298→    </Section>
   299→  );
   300→}
   301→
   302→function SeparatorValidation() {
   303→  return (
   304→    <Section title="8. SeparatorHorizontal">
   305→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   306→      <Text type="bodySM" mb="nano">
   307→        Content before separator
   308→      </Text>
   309→      <SeparatorHorizontal
   310→        mb="nano"
   311→        mt="nano"
   312→        bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   313→        height={1}
   314→        width="100%"
   315→      />
   316→      <Text type="bodySM">Content after separator</Text>
   317→    </Section>
   318→  );
   319→}
   320→
   321→function BackDropBottomValidation() {
   322→  return (
   323→    <Section title="9. BackDropBottom">
   324→      <StatusBadge status="warn" />
   325→      <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="nano">
   326→        BackDropBottom depends on react-native-modalize which requires native
   327→        modules (GestureHandler, Animated). It will NOT render in the Storybook
   328→        web context. Use a plain View/ScrollView wrapper as substitute for
   329→        SDUI stories.
   330→      </Text>
   331→    </Section>
   332→  );
   333→}
   334→
   335→function LoadingValidation() {
   336→  return (
   337→    <Section title="10. Loading">
   338→      <StatusBadge status="warn" />
   339→      <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="nano">
   340→        Loading depends on lottie-react-native which requires native Lottie
   341→        bindings. It will NOT render in the Storybook web context. Use a
   342→        simple ActivityIndicator or Text fallback for SDUI stories.
   343→      </Text>
   344→    </Section>
   345→  );
   346→}
   347→
   348→function DSComponentValidation() {
   349→  return (
   350→    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   351→      <View style={{ padding: 24, maxWidth: 480 }}>
   352→        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="smaller">
   353→          DS Component Validation — SP_0001.1
   354→        </Text>
   355→        <Text type="bodyMD" mb="smaller" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   356→          Validates all @semparar/design-system-app components used in voucher
   357→          screens. Each section shows the component with realistic props matching
   358→          InvoiceCashback screen usage.
   359→        </Text>
   360→        <SeparatorHorizontal
   361→          mb="smaller"
   362→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   363→          height={1}
   364→          width="100%"
   365→        />
   366→        <TextValidation />
   367→        <ButtonValidation />
   368→        <BoxValidation />
   369→        <InputBoxValidation />
   370→        <AlertValidation />
   371→        <IconValidation />
   372→        <ListTextIconValidation />
   373→        <SeparatorValidation />
   374→        <BackDropBottomValidation />
   375→        <LoadingValidation />
   376→
   377→        <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm" mt="smaller">
   378→          <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="nano">
   379→            Summary
   380→          </Text>
   381→          <Text type="bodyMD" mb="nano">
   382→            8/10 components render correctly in Storybook web context.
   383→          </Text>
   384→          <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   385→            BackDropBottom (Modalize) and Loading (Lottie) require native modules
   386→            and cannot render on web. SDUI adapters should provide web-safe
   387→            fallbacks for these two components.
   388→          </Text>
   389→        </Box>
   390→      </View>
   391→    </ScrollView>
   392→  );
   393→}
   394→
   395→const meta: Meta<typeof DSComponentValidation> = {
   396→  title: 'Validation/DS Components',
   397→  component: DSComponentValidation,
   398→};
   399→
   400→export default meta;
   401→
   402→type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;
   403→
   404→export const AllComponents: Story = {};
   405→
